title: jasminum malabaricum
intro: Jasminum malabaricum, also known as the Malabar jasmine or Indian star jasmine, is a fragrant, evergreen climber native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Jasminum malabaricum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
